notes: Concrete slot-00 Caldeira/Moura FX cointegration pair from the approved QM5_1156 card. The EA runs from the EURUSD.DWX host setfile with strategy_pair_slot=0 and trades the EURUSD.DWX/GBPUSD.DWX market-neutral spread using rolling Engle-Granger OLS/ADF and residual z-score rules. Added 2026-06-26 because prior Q02 attempts treated the pair-slot files as component-symbol tests and produced terminal INFRA_FAIL rows; this logical basket route lets Q02 judge the pair package rather than either leg standalone.
